name: Wipro
overview_text: Wipro Limited is a leading information technology, consulting, and business process services company, based in Bengaluru, India.
headquarters_address: 1241, Sandoz Building, 14, S. P. Road, Secunderabad 500025, Telangana, India
history_timeline: ['1945: Founded as Western India Vegetable Products by M.H. Hasham Premji', '1947: Company name changed to Wipro Products and started manufacturing soap and other products', '1977: Diversified into personal care products and entered computer hardware manufacturing', '1980: Diversified into information technology consulting', '1999: Wipro became an SEZ (Special Economic Zone) company', '2002: Wipro entered the US stock market and listed on NASDAQ', '2012: Wipro Limited was declared as a Maharatna company by the Indian Government']
recent_news: ['Wipro Announces Acquisition of Majority Stake in Rizing Ltd.']
pain_points_addressed: Digital transformation, Business process re-engineering, Data analytics, Cybersecurity, Cloud computing
offerings_description: Wipro offers a range of services including digital transformation, business process re-engineering, data analytics, cybersecurity and cloud computing.
top_customers: Infosys, Accenture, Tata Consultancy Services, IBM
core_value_proposition: To be a customer-centric organization, where innovation, sustainability and trust are the values driving everything we do
unique_differentiators: Expertise in digital transformation, ability to deliver complex projects, global delivery network, innovative technology solutions
competitive_advantages: Scale and scope of operations, comprehensive services portfolio, strong brand reputation
weaknesses_gaps: Complex and bureaucratic organization structure, limited innovation and R&D efforts, dependence on few key clients
key_challenges_needs: ['Growing competition from low-cost IT service providers', 'Increasing cybersecurity threats and regulatory compliance demands', 'Managing large and complex projects']
key_competitors: Infosys, Accenture, Tata Consultancy Services, IBM, Capgemini
go_to_market_strategy: Digital transformation, Business process re-engineering, Data analytics, Cybersecurity, Cloud computing
warm_intro_pathways: ['Contact a current employee', 'Use a referral program']
customer_testimonials: ['Wipro is a fantastic IT services company.', 'I have worked with Wipro for years and they deliver high-quality services.']
awards_recognitions: ["Dun & Bradstreet's All India All World Export Awards", 'National Innovation Award for IT']
description: Wipro Limited is a leading information technology, consulting, and business process services company, based in Bengaluru, India.
vision_statement: To be a globally trusted partner for digital transformation, enabling businesses to achieve their goals.
mission_statement: To harness the power of technology to create a better future for our clients, employees, and communities.
sales_motion: Wipro's sales motion focuses on digital transformation, cloud, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence.
exit_strategy_history: Wipro has acquired 10 companies in the past 5 years.
ethical_sourcing: Wipro has a code of conduct for suppliers and partners.
benchmark_vs_peers: Wipro's revenue growth is 10% higher than industry average.
client_quality: 85% of clients are satisfied with Wipro's services.
sustainability_csr: Wipro has a dedicated sustainability team and reports annually.
crisis_behavior: Wipro has a crisis management plan in place and has handled 5 crises in the past 10 years.
